name: Standard Chartered
ai_strategy_summary: Standard Chartered launched SC GPT across 41 markets for 70,000+ employees in March 2025 and debuted the world's first AI-generated video FX advisory product for wealth clients — setting a new bar for advisor-facing and client-facing AI simultaneously.
headline_metric: SC GPT live across 41 markets, 70,000+ employees; FX AI video advisory for clients
headline_initiative: SC GPT global rollout + FX Intelligent Expert AI video advisory

advisor_productivity.headline: SC GPT deployed across 41 markets for 70,000+ employees covering advisory, sales, and risk
advisor_productivity.detail: Standard Chartered launched SC GPT on March 27, 2025 — a proprietary GenAI platform covering sales, client advisory, and risk management across 70,000 employees in 41 markets.
evidence: SC GPT live across 41 markets as of March 2025
Covers sales, advisory, and risk management workflows
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: SC GPT's 41-market deployment shows that global AI rollout at scale is achievable. JPM's global advisory network should be targeting comparable coverage.

research_content.headline: FX Intelligent Expert: first AI-generated video market insights for wealth clients
research_content.detail: FX Intelligent Expert delivers dynamic AI-generated video insights on FX markets to private wealth clients — debuted in mainland China (December 2024), expanding to Singapore, Hong Kong, and Taiwan.
evidence: FX Intelligent Expert piloted in mainland China December 2024
Expanding to Singapore, Hong Kong, Taiwan
research_content.jpm_implication: AI-generated video market insights represent a new format for client engagement that JPM Private Bank has not yet deployed. First-mover advantage is available.
